mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report (reporter_id, product_id, reason, status) VALUES (#{reporterId}, #{productId}, #{reason}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, p.title AS product_title, u.nickname AS reporter_nickname FROM report r LEFT JOIN product p ON r.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON r.reporter_id = u.user_id ORDER BY r.status ASC, r.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE report SET status = #{status} WHERE report_id = #{reportId}
